Headline: Subway trains rerouted to elevated tracks
ShortDescription: Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions to allow for subway maintenance.

Trains will not stop at subway stations (see map below).

For fastest travel times, walk to the nearest ‘L’ station served by rerouted trains or use the free bus shuttle service offered between Fullerton and Clark/Lake in both directions.

Allow extra travel time.

*Entry/exit at Merchandise Mart station is via the Kinzie auxiliary entrance stairways, and requires a farecard (no vending machines), during hours when the building is closed. To make step-free transfers to Red Line trains during this time, consider shuttle buses to connect with Clark/Lake or Fullerton.

Headline: #171 U. of Chicago/Hyde Park Temporary Northbound Reroute near 59th/University
ShortDescription: Northobund 171 U. of Chicago/Hyde Park  buses are temporarily rerouted via 59th, Woodlawn and 55th: due to, street blockage near 59th/University.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northobund #171 U. of Chicago/Hyde Park  buses are temporarily rerouted via 59th, Woodlawn and 55th: due to, street blockage near 59th/University.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #15 Jeffery Local buses Temporary Reroute near Hyde Park/Greenwood
ShortDescription: 15 Jeffery Local buses are temporarily rerouted due to a street blockage near Hyde Park/Greenwood.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#15 Jeffery Local buses are temporarily rerouted due to a street blockage near Hyde Park/Greenwood.

Eastbound #15 Jeffery buses are temporarily rerouted via 51st, Drexel, 47th, Lake Park, 51st, and over to regular route.

Westbound #15 Jeffery buses are temporarily rerouted via 51st, Woodlawn, 47th, Drexel, 51st, and over to regular route.

Allow extra travel time.
